name: ALPHA PRO TECH LTD
summary: Alpha Pro Tech, Ltd. protects people, products, and environments through two business segments: Building Supply and Disposable Protective Apparel. Building Supply products include housewrap, housewrap accessories, and synthetic roof underlayment under the REX trademark. Disposable Protective Apparel includes shoecovers, bouffant caps, coveralls, gowns, face masks, and face shields sold to cleanroom, industrial, pharmaceutical, medical, and dental markets, primarily in the United States under the Alpha Pro Tech brand and private label.
